message:
perf(cache): replace 16-shard lock scan with AtomicBool for has_pending_touches (br-11fd5, I.1)

Flat combining optimization: enqueue_touch sets atomic flag, drain_touches
clears it. has_pending_touches is now a single atomic load instead of
acquiring 16 shard mutexes. Conservative approximation: false positives
are harmless (trigger a no-op drain). 4 tests passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
